title: Implement storefront product detail variant UI
verify: Storefront product cards expose variant-aware summary data from backend data when provided.
Product detail page renders loading, not found/unpublished, no-variant/default SKU, missing option, impossible combination, unavailable variant, valid variant, and cart-action handoff failure states.
Add-to-cart handoff includes product identifier or handle, selected variant/SKU identifier, quantity defaulting to one, and validation state, without implementing durable cart persistence.
evidence_required: Screenshot or trace showing product detail variant selection and blocked/valid add-to-cart handoff states.
constraints: Storefront reads product detail and variant data through backend APIs.
Storefront may render option labels/order but must not invent available variant values.
Cart-action handoff must remain a narrow validation boundary until FT-003 implements durable cart behavior.
invariants: Do not hardcode product variant data in the storefront as source of truth.
Do not implement durable cart persistence, login cart merge, checkout, payment, order, or inventory reservation.
Product detail availability is not authoritative for final stock consistency.
purpose: Make the backend product detail contract usable through buyer-facing product detail and product card variant UI.
success_outcome: Buyer can inspect a product, select a valid sellable variant/SKU, and reach a scoped cart-action handoff while invalid selections stay blocked.
anti_goals: Do not implement durable cart persistence or cart merge.
Do not implement inventory reservation or order behavior.
Do not turn product cards into full configurators.

forbidden_scope: backend product detail contract changes not covered by TASK-011
durable cart persistence or cart merge
stop_conditions: Storefront cannot consume the backend product detail contract.
UI work requires changing FT-002 API semantics.
Verification cannot show invalid selections blocked and valid selected variant handoff.
